name: Organic Trust Retreat — Richmond's Premier Wellness Club
greeting: Hi! I'm the Organic Trust Retreat — Richmond's Premier Wellness Club assistant. How can I help you today?
content:
=== https://organictrust.co.uk/ ===
Join today — no joining fee on 3 & 12 month memberships  |  Call us: 020 0000 0000

RICHMOND'S PREMIER WELLNESS RETREAT

Where Nature Meets Performance.

An adult-only sanctuary for those who refuse to compromise. Exceptional fitness, restorative spa, and fine dining — set within twelve acres of private grounds.

EXPLORE MEMBERSHIP
BOOK A TOUR
SCROLL

MEMBERSHIP

Membership

Unlimited access to every facility, class, and space within the retreat. Tailored tiers to suit your life.

Discover →

GYM & FITNESS

Gym & Fitness

15,000 sq ft of precision-engineered training space. Technogym equipment, personal training, and 80+ weekly classes.

Discover →

SPA & WELLNESS

Spa & Wellness

Thermal suite, hydrotherapy, eight treatment rooms, and a nail suite — a complete sanctuary of restoration.

Discover →

Everything Included in Your Membership
🏋️
Unlimited Gym Access

Full facility including all equipment and studios

🤸
Complimentary PT Sessions

One free session per month, plus two in your first month

📅
80+ Classes Weekly

Holistic, strength, cycle, aqua, dance and signature formats

🌿
Full Spa Facilities

Thermal suite, pools, relaxation lounge included daily

📊
Body Composition Analysis

Regular Precision Biometric scans with digital results

💆
Member Discounts

Up to 20% off treatments, dining, and spa day packages

🌳
Nature Grounds Access

12 acres of private gardens and woodland walking trails

💻
Hot Desk Workspace

Dedicated co-working space included with membership

FINE DINING

The Garden Table

Our on-site restaurant serves seasonal British cuisine from breakfast through to dinner, seven days a week. Sourced from local farms and producers, every dish reflects the retreat's commitment to nourishment and quality.

Afternoon tea served daily from 14:00. Private dining available for groups of up to sixteen.

VIEW THE MENU
Ready to Begin?

Book a complimentary tour of the retreat and meet our membership team in person.
